subject: [PATCH v2] memory tiering: Do not allow promotion if NUMA_BALANCING_MEMORY_TIERING is disabled

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Identified a lack of supporting data to justify the change, suggesting that additional benchmarks or placement correctness tests are needed.

reviews.author: Ritesh Harjani
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the concerns and agreed to live with the current behavior for now, but expressed willingness to revisit the issue if a real-world use case is found.

2026-04-09.patch_summary: Patch proposes to prevent page promotion when NUMA_BALANCING_MEMORY_TIERING is disabled, but lacks supporting data to justify the change.
